textPlain: There are all kinds of retro stuff that I still love. What is it about Palm OS that you love?
I love this, I started coding for Mac OS 7-9 the other year in Think C and it reminded me why I originally loved it.

It's the whole idea of 'apps' before smartphones became a thing.
It's also the simplicity of how these worked, forget multitasking, just focus on one thing at a time.No subscriptions! Either the applications were free or it's a one-off fee/shareware kind of thing.And it's ofcourse nostalgia, I made my first game for Palm OS over 20 years ago, it was nice to revisit it and get familiarized again with how the whole build system worked.
